app.title: Igitabo cy'Ibyakozwe n'Intumwa
app.tagline: Menya Ijambo · Wiringire Umwuka · Bwiriza Izina
app.errorHelp: Koresha {cmd} kuri mudasobwa yawe, cyangwa urebe ko Netlify yashoboye kubaka.

scripture.chapterUnavailable: Iki gice ntikirahari muri uru rurimi.

paul.name: Sawuli w'i Taruso (Pawulo)
paul.summary: Sawuli yavukiye hano i Taruso — "umuturage w'umugi ukomeye" (Ibyakozwe 21:39). Yari Umuyahudi w'umuturage w'Abaroma kuva avuka, yigishijwe i Yerusalemu na Gamaliyeli; yarenganyaga itorero kugeza ubwo Kristo wazutse amubonekeye mu nzira ya Damasiko. Nyuma y'imyaka yo kwicecekera hano i Taruso, Barinaba yaje kumushaka amujyana i Antiyokiya (Ibyakozwe 11:25) — uwarenganyaga itorero ahinduka intumwa y'amahanga.

barnabas.name: Barinaba (Yosefu Umulewi)
barnabas.summary: Yosefu, Umulewi wavukiye muri Kupuro, intumwa zamwise Barinaba — "Umwana w'ihumure" (Ibyakozwe 4:36). Yagurishije umurima we afasha itorero rya Yerusalemu, avuganira Sawuli wari umaze guhinduka igihe abandi bose bamutinyaga, yemera ubuntu bw'Imana mu Banyamahanga i Antiyokiya, kandi aha Mariko Yohana amahirwe ya kabiri. Mu rugendo rwa mbere yabwirije hano i Salami (Ibyakozwe 13:5); imigenzo ivuga ko yapfiriye hano ahagana mu mwaka wa 61.

journeys.journey-4: Urugendo rwo mu bwato ajya i Roma

teaching.comingSoonBody: Iki gice kizaba kirimo inyigisho za Pasitori Fidele Bolton za buri gice cy'Ibyakozwe n'Intumwa — zikomoka mu nyandiko za PSOS, igitabo cy'amasomo {curriculum}, inyigisho, n'inkuru.
teaching.builderStep1: Shyira amadosiye .docx ya PSOS Ibyakozwe 1–12 muri {uploads}
teaching.noContent: Nta nyigisho zirahari muri iki gice.

type.book-section: Bikomoka kuri: Menya Ijambo | Wiringire Umwuka

timeline.hint: Kanda kuri buri gikorwa ujye aho

cornelius.title: Kornelio n'urugo rwe
cornelius.blurb: Ubutumwa busenya urukuta hagati y'Abayahudi n'Abanyamahanga.

paul-arrested.title: Pawulo afatirwa i Yerusalemu
paul-arrested.blurb: Urugendo ruva mu bwisanzure rujya mu minyururu.

voyage-to-rome.title: Urugendo rwo mu bwato ajya i Roma

first-jerusalem-visit.title: Urugendo rwa mbere i Yerusalemu
first-jerusalem-visit.blurb: Imyaka itatu nyuma ya Damasiko — iminsi cumi n'itanu kumwe na Petero.

famine-relief.title: Urugendo rwo gutabara inzara
famine-relief.blurb: Antiyokiya yohereje imfashanyo i Yudaya binyuze kuri Barinaba na Sawuli.

corinth-gallio.title: Korinto — imbere ya Galiyo
corinth-gallio.blurb: Guverineri yanze ikirego — ubuhungiro bw'amategeko ku butumwa.

caesarea-prison.title: Kayisariya — afungwa imyaka ibiri
caesarea-prison.blurb: Felikisi areka Pawulo mu minyururu; Fesito ahererekanya urubanza.

timelineView.title: Urutonde rw'igihe cy'Ibyakozwe
timelineView.subtitle: Kuva kuri Pentekositi kugeza i Roma — bishushanyije ku gipimo, kugira ngo ubone igihe cyashize.
timelineView.scaleNote: Icyuho kinini bivuga igihe kirekire cyashize; amatariki ni ay'agereranyo
timelineView.jumpHint: kanda igikorwa cyose kugira ngo ufungure icyo gice

prologue.heading: Iminsi 50 ya mbere
prologue.scaleTag: ibarwa mu minsi — atari ku gipimo
prologue.waiting: Iminsi 10 — gutegereza no gusenga i Yerusalemu (Ibyakozwe 1:14)

atlas.title: Atlasi y'Ibyakozwe n'Intumwa
atlas.subtitle: Ikusanyirizo ry'amakarita — kurikira buri muhamya: aho yavukiye, aho yakoreye umurimo, n'uko inkuru ye yarangiye.
atlas.hint: Kanda igikorwa icyo ari cyo cyose — ikarita irahaguruka
atlas.timelineLabel: Ubuzima bwe mu gihe — ku gipimo
